Class Totem

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.Totem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Totem extends Object implements Serializable
A player's totem (pawn). It can sit either on an OfferTile or on a Slot of the turn-order tile, but never both at once: moving it to one location automatically detaches it from the other.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Totem

      public Totem(String color, Player owner)
      Parameters:
      color - the totem colour
      owner - the player who owns this totem
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if color is null/blank or owner is null

  • Method Details

    • getColor

      public String getColor()
      Returns:
      the totem colour

    • getOwner

      public Player getOwner()
      Returns:
      the player who owns this totem

    • getCurrentOfferTile

      public OfferTile getCurrentOfferTile()
      Returns:
      the offer tile this totem sits on, or null

    • getCurrentSlot

      public Slot getCurrentSlot()
      Returns:
      the turn-order slot this totem sits on, or null

    • isOnOfferTrack

      public boolean isOnOfferTrack()
      Returns:
      true if the totem is currently on the offer track

    • isOnTurnOrderTrack

      public boolean isOnTurnOrderTrack()
      Returns:
      true if the totem is currently on the turn-order track

    • moveToTurnOrder

      public void moveToTurnOrder(Slot slot)
      Moves this totem onto a turn-order slot, detaching it from its current location first.
      Parameters:
      slot - the destination slot

    • moveToOffer

      public void moveToOffer(OfferTile offerTile)
      Moves this totem onto an offer tile, detaching it from its current location first.
      Parameters:
      offerTile - the destination tile
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if offerTile is null
      IllegalStateException - if the tile is already occupied
